title: 8 Must-Stock Ramadan Wooden Decorations for Wholesale Buyers in 2026
meta_desc: Top 8 Ramadan wooden decorations for wholesale — entry-level wood ornaments, large-format decor signs, and LED moon lights. Factory-direct pricing from $0.44 to $6.71 with volume buying tips.

body.content: Why Wooden Decorations Are the Underrated Margin Play for Ramadan 2026

body.alt: Premium Wooden Ramadan Decoration wall art wholesale SKU 651062

body.content: While LED lights and lanterns dominate the wholesale conversation, wooden decorations quietly deliver some of the highest margins in the Ramadan decor category. Wood-based products offer three structural advantages that make them a compelling buy: superior durability (no denting, tearing, or LED failure), premium perceived value at retail (customers instinctively associate wood with quality), and exceptional carton density (flat-packed designs maximize units per CBM).

With 111 designs in our Deco-Wood catalog, we analyzed 2026 order data to identify the 8 SKUs that balance sell-through rate, retail margin, and visual impact across three distinct product segments: entry-level wooden ornaments, large-format decor signs, and LED-integrated wooden lights. Every product below is in ready stock with flexible MOQ — whether you are building a new category or expanding an existing wood decor assortment.
1. Entry-Level Wooden Ramadan Ornaments — $0.44 & $0.57

SKU 614087 ($0.44, 12×0.5×13cm) and SKU 614042 ($0.57, 10pcs pack, 9×5.5cm each) are the volume anchors for any wooden decoration assortment. These are compact, flat-packed wooden ornaments designed for table scatter, gift bag inserts, and retail counter impulse displays. At under $0.60 wholesale, retailers price at $1.49–2.49 (71–77% margin) or bundle 5 for $5.99. SKU 614042 ships in a 10-piece set, offering a compelling unit economics story for buyers who want to hit higher retail price points with perceived value bundling. Both SKUs are exceptionally lightweight for their dimensions, with per-carton unit counts in the hundreds — ideal for container consolidation with heavier decoration categories.
2. Large-Format Wooden Decor Signs — $1.92 Each

body.alt: Large Wooden Ramadan Decor Sign 20.5x20cm wholesale SKU 650104

body.content: SKU 650104 and SKU 650105 are substantial 20.5×20cm wooden decor pieces at $1.92 each. These are statement products — sized for wall mounting, door hanging, or tabletop display — that command a significantly higher retail price point than the entry-level ornaments. At this wholesale price, the retail sweet spot is $5.99–7.99 (68–75% margin). Both SKUs ship with 2 professional product photos. The square format is display-case friendly for brick-and-mortar retailers, and the 80g weight keeps shipping manageable. For buyers servicing home decor stores, gift shops, and cultural retailers, these are the core assortment products that deliver the best balance of perceived value and unit economics.
3. LED Moon Wooden Light 20cm — $3.45

body.alt: LED Moon Wooden Light 20cm Ramadan decoration hot seller SKU 641348

body.content: SKU 641348 bridges our wood decor and LED lighting categories — a 20cm crescent moon silhouette cut from wood with integrated LED illumination. Tagged hot based on 2026 buyer activity, this is the entry point to our best-selling LED wood light series. At $3.45 wholesale, retailers price at $9.99–12.99 (65–74% margin). The combination of natural wood grain texture with warm LED glow photographs exceptionally well — a critical advantage for online marketplace sellers where product images drive conversion. Box-packed individually, the 1-piece format simplifies inventory management for retailers testing the category. For buyers already stocking LED lights, this SKU adds wood decor margin without requiring a new supplier relationship.
4. LED Moon Wooden Light 30cm — $4.98

SKU 641349 is the 30cm sibling to the 20cm SKU above — same hot-tag designation, same crescent moon silhouette, 50% larger dimensions. At $4.98 wholesale, it hits the mid-tier price point where retail pricing comfortably lands at $14.99–17.99 (67–72% margin). The 30cm size is the most frequently reordered size across our LED wood light series — buyers report it as the sweet spot for retail display impact versus shipping cost. The larger footprint makes it suitable for window displays and wall-mounted arrangements where the 20cm version can get lost. Our recommendation: stock both the 20cm and 30cm sizes to offer your retail customers an upsell path.
5. Premium Wooden Decor Panel — $5.14

body.alt: Premium Wooden Ramadan Decor Panel 24.5x32.5cm detailed shot SKU 651062

body.content: SKU 651062 is the premium anchor of our non-LED wood decor range at $5.14 — a large 24.5×32.5×5cm wooden panel that ships with 5 professional product photos, the richest image set in our Deco-Wood catalog. This is the hero piece for retailers targeting the premium home decor segment: interior design stores, upscale gift shops, hotel and restaurant procurement, and specialty cultural retailers. At this wholesale price, retail pricing ranges $15.99–19.99 (68–74% margin). The multi-angle photo set makes online listing creation essentially turnkey — a significant operational advantage for marketplace sellers launching new product categories. Packed 16 units per carton, the CBM efficiency remains strong for a product of this size.
6. LED Moon Wooden Light 40cm — $6.71

body.alt: LED Moon Wooden Light 40cm large format Ramadan decoration SKU 641350

body.content: SKU 641350 is the 40cm flagship of our LED Moon Wooden Light series at $6.71 — the largest hot-tagged size before entering our professional-grade 50–80cm range. At 40cm, this piece is designed for large-format displays: restaurant and hotel lobby decoration, event venue styling, and premium retail window installations. The retail sweet spot is $19.99–24.99 (66–73% margin), and the hot-tag designation signals proven 2026 reorder performance. For buyers already testing the 20cm and 30cm sizes, the 40cm represents the natural upsell that boosts average order value. It is particularly popular with event planning and rental businesses who need statement pieces — the LED illumination and wood grain texture create a visual product that photographs far above its wholesale price point.
Ramadan Wooden Decoration SKUs at a Glance
Sourcing Wooden Decorations — Strategy for Wholesale Buyers

Wooden decorations are among the most container-efficient products in the Ramadan decor category. Most designs are flat-packed with thicknesses measured in millimeters rather than centimeters — meaning carton unit counts are consistently high and per-unit freight costs are negligible even on small trial orders. A standard 20ft container can absorb thousands of wooden decoration units alongside bulkier categories like lanterns and LED garlands, making wood decor an ideal top-up category that improves overall container margin without consuming meaningful CBM.

Our recommended three-tier strategy: build your wood decor assortment with 2–3 entry-level wooden ornaments ($0.44–0.57) for impulse sales and volume, 2–3 large-format decor signs ($1.92) as core assortment anchors, and 1–2 LED-integrated wooden lights ($3.45–6.71) for margin and category differentiation. Buyers who stock all three tiers consistently outperform single-tier buyers in total decoration category revenue. MOQ starts at one carton per SKU for stock designs. Custom wood cut-outs, greetings, or color finishes are available with a 600-unit MOQ per design.

Browse our full Ramadan Wooden Decoration collection with 111 designs and current wholesale pricing. For mixed-carton orders, custom wood designs, or volume quotations, contact our sales team directly.

title: 8 Must-Stock Ramadan Table Decorations for Wholesale Buyers in 2026

body.content: SKU 650084 is our premium anchor at $6.71 — a handcrafted 215x50x50mm glass ornament that targets the high-end decor segment. Ramadan Table Decoration SKUs at a Glance
Sourcing Table Decorations — Tips for Wholesale Buyers

Table decorations offer exceptional carton efficiency — most designs are flat-packed or compact, maximizing units per CBM and minimizing per-unit freight cost. A standard 20ft container can accommodate thousands of table decoration units alongside bulkier categories like lanterns and LED garlands. Our recommended strategy: build your table décor assortment across three price tiers — entry-level centrepieces ($0.46-0.58) for volume and impulse sales, mid-tier decorative pieces ($1.61-2.68) for core assortment, and one premium hero SKU ($6.71) for margin and category perception.

For markets where both Ramadan and Eid are celebrated, always stock both greeting variants. Our order data consistently shows that dual-greeting buyers achieve 30-40% higher category revenue than single-greeting buyers. MOQ starts at one carton per SKU for stock designs. body.alt: Eid Triangle Flag Bunting White Gold 300cm party decoration wholesale

At this price, retailers can comfortably price at $1.99 (80% margin) or bundle 3 for $4.99. The shimmering metallic finish catches light brilliantly, making it the go-to choice for retail window displays and photo backdrops. The two-string design allows flexible arrangement — hang them together for a dense, dramatic effect, or split across two display areas. 4 professional product photos available for your online listings.

body.content: SKU 613086 (Eid Mubarak) and SKU 613089 (Ramadan Kareem) are our premium banner offerings at $1.64 each — a substantial 46x300cm polyester cloth banner that makes an instant visual statement. body.content: Sourcing Tips for Bunting & Banner Wholesale

Bunting and banners are among the most container-efficient products in our catalog. Colorway notes: Ramadan bunting sells best in White Gold, Blue Gold, and multicolor schemes. Gulf region buyers favor gold-heavy designs; European buyers lean toward blue and silver tones. body.content: Ordering Tips for LED Lights

LED lights are lightweight but vary significantly in carton density. Entry-level items like the LED Candle (641185) pack over 700 units per carton — ideal for container consolidation and low per-unit shipping. Larger decorative pieces like the Rainbow LED (641260) and USB Garland (641339) take more CBM per unit. Our recommended strategy: anchor your container with high-density volume items and top off with 2-3 premium SKUs for margin.

Battery notes: most LED products ship without batteries included, which simplifies customs clearance and avoids hazmat classification. Inform your end customers clearly — our product descriptions and packaging explicitly state battery requirements. For markets where batteries-included is preferred (some European retail chains), contact us about custom packaging options.

Browse our full Ramadan LED Light collection with 184 designs. For custom LED colors, packaging, or battery configurations, MOQ starts at 600 units per design. Mix and match across SKUs to meet volume thresholds.

title: Ramadan & Eid Decorations Wholesale Buying Guide 2026
meta_desc: Complete guide for wholesale buyers of Ramadan and Eid decorations. Product categories, sourcing tips, MOQ, shipping, and trends for Islamic party supplies from Yiwu.

body.content: Why Source Ramadan Decorations from Yiwu, China

Yiwu is the world's largest wholesale market for party supplies and decorations. For Ramadan and Eid products specifically, Yiwu offers unmatched variety, competitive pricing, and established supply chains. Major retailers across the Middle East, Europe, and North America source their Islamic celebration products from Yiwu factories.
Top Product Categories for Ramadan & Eid 2026
Based on 2026 market trends, the most in-demand Ramadan decoration categories include:

Decorative hanging ornaments (lanterns, stars, crescents); LED light decorations and illuminated displays; Paper plates, cups, and napkins with Islamic motifs; Table centerpieces and serving trays; Balloon arrangements and balloon kits; Backdrop and wall decorations; Fridge magnets and small gifts; Ramadan calendars and countdown items
Understanding MOQ and Custom Orders

For spot goods (ready-stock items), most Yiwu suppliers offer flexible minimum order quantities. You can order as little as one carton to test the market. For custom designs and packaging, typical MOQ starts at 600 pieces per design. Customization options include logo printing, custom packaging, color variations, and size modifications.
Quality Control and Certification

Ensure your supplier provides product photos and samples before bulk ordering. Key quality considerations include material safety (especially for food-contact items like plates and cups), color fastness, and packaging durability for international shipping. Many Yiwu factories now comply with EU and US safety standards.
Shipping and Logistics

Shipping options include sea freight (most cost-effective for large orders, 25-40 days), air freight (faster, 5-10 days), and express courier for samples and small orders. Work with a freight forwarder to consolidate shipments and reduce per-unit costs. Always factor in customs duties and import taxes for your destination country.

title: How to Import Party Supplies from China: A Complete Guide
meta_desc: Step-by-step guide to importing party supplies from China. Learn about finding suppliers, negotiating MOQ, quality control, shipping, and customs clearance for wholesale decorations.

body.content: Step 1: Research Your Market

Before importing, understand your local market demand. Which party themes are popular? What price points work? Are there seasonal peaks (Ramadan, Christmas, Halloween)? Research competitors and identify gaps in the market.
Step 2: Find Reliable Suppliers

Quality suppliers can be found through trade platforms (Alibaba, Made-in-China), trade fairs (Yiwu Fair, Canton Fair), or direct factory visits. Look for suppliers with export experience, positive reviews, and willingness to provide samples. A supplier who communicates clearly and responds promptly is worth their weight in gold.
Step 3: Request Samples and Compare

Always request samples from multiple suppliers before placing a bulk order. Compare material quality, printing clarity, packaging, and overall finish. Pay for samples — it's a small investment that prevents costly mistakes. Test products in real conditions (e.g., do paper plates hold food? Do decorations resist humidity?).
Step 4: Negotiate Terms

Key negotiation points include unit price, MOQ, payment terms (typically 30% deposit, 70% before shipping), delivery timeline, and shipping responsibility (FOB vs CIF). Build long-term relationships — loyal buyers get better prices and priority service.
Step 5: Arrange Shipping and Customs

Work with an experienced freight forwarder who handles party supplies. They'll manage documentation (commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading), customs clearance, and delivery to your warehouse. Consider sea freight for cost efficiency on orders over 1 CBM. For urgent restocking, air freight or express is faster but more expensive.

title: Eid Decoration Trends 2026: What Wholesale Buyers Need to Know
meta_desc: 2026 Eid decoration market trends for wholesale buyers. Popular colors, materials, and product types driving demand. Stay ahead of the curve with these party supply insights.

body.content: Gold and White Continues to Dominate

The classic gold and white color combination remains the top choice for Eid decorations in 2026. Buyers are gravitating toward elegant, minimalist designs that work across both home and commercial settings. Metallic gold accents on white backgrounds create a premium look that customers love.
Sustainable and Eco-Friendly Materials Rising

European and North American markets are increasingly demanding eco-friendly party supplies. Paper decorations, biodegradable balloons, and recyclable packaging are trending upward. Suppliers offering FSC-certified paper products and plastic-free packaging have a competitive advantage.
LED and Interactive Decorations

LED-lit decorations — from lantern strings to illuminated crescent moons — are among the fastest-growing categories. Interactive elements like DIY decoration kits and customizable photo backdrop sets are also gaining popularity, especially for event planners and party rental businesses.
Cultural Fusion Designs

Buyers are increasingly seeking designs that blend traditional Islamic motifs with contemporary aesthetics. Geometric patterns with modern color palettes, calligraphy art in minimalist frames, and fusion designs that work for both Ramadan and general celebrations are in high demand.

title: Party Supplies MOQ & Custom Packaging: Everything Wholesale Buyers Should Know
meta_desc: Learn how MOQ (minimum order quantity) and custom packaging work for wholesale party supplies. Practical tips for negotiating with Chinese factories and building your brand.

body.content: What is MOQ and Why Does It Matter?

MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity) is the smallest quantity a supplier will produce or sell per order. For party supplies, MOQs vary: spot goods (ready stock) often have no minimum or very low minimums (1 carton), while custom-designed products typically require 600-1000 pieces per design.
How to Negotiate Lower MOQ

Tips for negotiating MOQ with suppliers: Start with spot goods to build a relationship, combine multiple designs into one order to meet total volume requirements, offer to pay a small premium for lower quantities on your first order, and be transparent about your growth plans — suppliers will accommodate promising long-term partners.
Custom Packaging Options

Custom packaging transforms generic party supplies into branded products. Options include custom header cards, printed polybags, branded boxes, and hang tags. Typical MOQ for custom packaging is 500-1000 units per design. Design files should be provided in vector format (AI, EPS, or high-res PDF).
Cost Breakdown for Custom Orders

Custom orders involve three cost components: product cost, packaging cost, and mold/tooling cost (if applicable). A typical custom paper plate order might break down as: $0.30/plate product cost + $0.05/plate packaging + one-time $50-100 mold fee. Total per-unit cost decreases significantly at higher quantities.

title: Party Supplies Profit Margins: A Guide for Wholesalers and Retailers
meta_desc: Real-world profit margin analysis for party supplies wholesalers and retailers. Cost breakdown, pricing strategies, and tips to maximize your return on wholesale decorations.

body.content: Typical Profit Margins in Party Supplies

Wholesale party supplies typically operate on a 50-70% markup at retail. A Ramadan decoration set purchased at $2.00 per unit might retail for $5.99-7.99. Wholesale-to-wholesale margins are thinner, typically 30-40%, making volume critical for profitability.
The Impact of Shipping on Margins

Shipping costs can make or break party supply margins. Sea freight typically adds 15-25% to product cost, while air freight can add 40-60%. Consolidating orders, choosing slower shipping methods, and optimizing carton packing (maximizing units per CBM) are key strategies for margin protection.
Pricing Strategy by Channel

Pricing varies significantly by sales channel: Amazon/eBay sellers typically mark up 2-3x on wholesale cost to cover platform fees and advertising. Brick-and-mortar retailers target 2.5-3x markup. B2B wholesalers operate on 1.3-1.8x to maintain competitive pricing while still profitable. Event planners mark up 20-40% on product cost as part of their service package.
Maximizing Your Return

Key profit optimization strategies include buying seasonal products during off-season (lower prices, more negotiating power), ordering full containers to minimize per-unit shipping cost, bundling complementary products for higher average order value, and building direct factory relationships to eliminate middlemen markups.

title: Global Shipping Guide for Wholesale Party Supplies
meta_desc: Complete guide to shipping wholesale party supplies internationally. Sea freight vs air freight, customs documentation, freight forwarders, and cost-saving tips for importers.

body.content: Sea Freight vs Air Freight

For wholesale party supplies, sea freight is the standard choice. A 20ft container (33 CBM) can hold thousands of decoration sets, making per-unit shipping costs negligible. Typical transit times: 25-35 days to Middle East, 30-40 days to Europe, 15-25 days to Southeast Asia. Air freight makes sense for samples, urgent restocking, or high-value custom items where speed justifies the premium.
Understanding Incoterms

The most common incoterms for party supplies are FOB (Free On Board) and CIF (Cost, Insurance, Freight). FOB means the supplier delivers to the port and you handle shipping from there. CIF includes shipping and insurance to your destination port. New importers often prefer CIF for simplicity, while experienced buyers use FOB to control their own freight forwarding relationships.
Customs Documentation Checklist

Essential documents for customs clearance include commercial invoice (showing product description, HS codes, declared value), packing list (carton count, weights, dimensions), bill of lading or airway bill, certificate of origin (if claiming preferential tariff rates), and any required safety certificates for your destination country.
Working with Freight Forwarders

A good freight forwarder is your logistics partner. They handle booking, documentation, customs clearance, and final delivery. Choose a forwarder with experience in party supplies — they'll understand the product characteristics (light but bulky) and optimize accordingly. Get quotes from 3-4 forwarders before each shipment to ensure competitive pricing.
Insurance and Risk Management

Marine cargo insurance costs approximately 0.2-0.5% of cargo value and protects against loss, damage, and theft during transit. Given the relatively low value of party supplies, many buyers skip insurance — but if you're shipping a full container worth $20,000+, the $40-100 premium is well worth the peace of mind.
